rationale: In the citing paper, Choi, Hui, and Bell (2010) appears only in a brief literature-review sentence as an example of work on spatial/channel aspects of seeding. The citation is grouped with other prior studies and is not used to build the paper's core acceleration-versus-expansion framework, agent-based model, measures, or empirical interpretation. There is no distinct follow-on argument or methodological dependence tied specifically to this cited paper.
